description: Business Semantic Layer for AI BI Chatbot POC. This document maps natural language business terms to physical Redshift tables, columns, and SQL formulas.

loan_master.description: Core loan-level table. One row per loan account.

product_type.description: Loan product. Values: HOME_LOAN, PERSONAL_LOAN, SME_LOAN, GOLD_LOAN, VEHICLE_LOAN, EDUCATION_LOAN

segment.description: Business segment. Values: RETAIL, SME, CORPORATE, MICROFINANCE

region.description: Geographic region. Values: NORTH, SOUTH, EAST, WEST, CENTRAL

loan_status.description: Current status. Values: ACTIVE, NPA, CLOSED, WRITTEN_OFF, RESTRUCTURED, NPA_SUBSTANDARD, NPA_DOUBTFUL, NPA_LOSS

sanction_amount.description: Original sanctioned loan amount in INR

outstanding_principal.description: Current outstanding principal balance in INR

disbursed_amount.description: Total amount disbursed to borrower in INR

closure_date.description: Date loan was closed (NULL if active)

npa_date.description: Date loan was classified as NPA (NULL if not NPA)

dpd.description: Days Past Due — number of days overdue currently

loan_officer_id.description: ID of the relationship manager / loan officer

emi_collections.description: Monthly EMI payment records. One row per EMI due per loan.

payment_date.description: Actual payment received date (NULL if unpaid)

principal_component.description: Principal portion of EMI in INR

interest_component.description: Interest portion of EMI in INR

payment_mode.description: Values: NACH, NEFT, CASH, CHEQUE, UPI, ONLINE

month_year.description: Collection month in YYYY-MM format for easy filtering

quarter.description: Collection quarter in YYYY-QN format. E.g. 2024-Q3

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year in FY-YYYY format. E.g. FY-2025 (Apr 2024 to Mar 2025)

disbursements.description: Loan disbursement records. One row per disbursement event (loans can have multiple tranches).

disbursement_amount.description: Amount disbursed in this tranche in INR

channel.description: Origination channel. Values: BRANCH, DSA, DIGITAL, DIRECT, PARTNER

customers.description: Customer master data. One row per customer.

vintage_months.description: Months since first loan with the institution

risk_category.description: Internal risk rating. Values: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, VERY_HIGH

region.description: Geographic region: NORTH, SOUTH, EAST, WEST, CENTRAL

npa_rate.label: NPA Rate
npa_rate.description: Percentage of loan accounts classified as NPA out of total active loan accounts.
npa_rate.formula: COUNT(CASE WHEN loan_status IN ('NPA','NPA_SUBSTANDARD','NPA_DOUBTFUL','NPA_LOSS') THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)
npa_rate.rbi_definition: A loan is classified as NPA when interest or principal is overdue for more than 90 days.
npa_rate.example_sql: SELECT segment, COUNT(CASE WHEN loan_status IN ('NPA','NPA_SUBSTANDARD','NPA_DOUBTFUL','NPA_LOSS') THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS npa_rate FROM loan_master GROUP BY segment

npa_amount.label: NPA Outstanding Amount
npa_amount.description: Total outstanding principal balance of all NPA accounts in INR.
npa_amount.formula: SUM(CASE WHEN loan_status IN ('NPA','NPA_SUBSTANDARD','NPA_DOUBTFUL','NPA_LOSS') THEN outstanding_principal ELSE 0 END)
npa_amount.example_sql: SELECT region, SUM(CASE WHEN loan_status IN ('NPA','NPA_SUBSTANDARD','NPA_DOUBTFUL','NPA_LOSS') THEN outstanding_principal ELSE 0 END) AS npa_amount FROM loan_master GROUP BY region

total_disbursement.label: Total Disbursement
total_disbursement.description: Total amount disbursed to borrowers in INR for a given period.
total_disbursement.example_sql: SELECT quarter, segment, SUM(disbursement_amount) AS total_disbursement FROM disbursements WHERE fiscal_year = 'FY-2025' GROUP BY quarter, segment

disbursement_count.label: Number of Loans Disbursed
disbursement_count.description: Count of distinct loan disbursements in a given period.

collection_efficiency.label: Collection Efficiency
collection_efficiency.description: Percentage of EMI amount actually collected vs total EMI amount due in a period.
collection_efficiency.example_sql: SELECT quarter, SUM(amount_paid) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(emi_amount), 0) AS collection_efficiency FROM emi_collections WHERE quarter = '2024-Q3' GROUP BY quarter

total_emi_collected.label: Total EMI Collected
total_emi_collected.description: Total EMI amount actually received from borrowers in INR.

overdue_amount.label: Overdue Amount
overdue_amount.description: Total EMI amount that is unpaid past its due date.
overdue_amount.formula: SUM(CASE WHEN payment_status IN ('UNPAID','PARTIAL') THEN (emi_amount - amount_paid) ELSE 0 END)

par30.label: PAR 30
par30.description: Portfolio at Risk — outstanding principal of loans with DPD > 30 days, as % of total outstanding.
par30.formula: SUM(CASE WHEN dpd > 30 THEN outstanding_principal ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(outstanding_principal), 0)

par90.label: PAR 90
par90.description: Portfolio at Risk — outstanding principal of loans with DPD > 90 days (pre-NPA stage) as % of total outstanding.
par90.formula: SUM(CASE WHEN dpd > 90 THEN outstanding_principal ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(outstanding_principal), 0)

outstanding_portfolio.label: Total Outstanding Portfolio
outstanding_portfolio.description: Total outstanding principal balance across all active loans in INR.

yield.label: Portfolio Yield
yield.description: Weighted average interest rate across the active loan portfolio.

mappings.this quarter: quarter = CONCAT(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE), '-Q', EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM CURRENT_DATE))
mappings.last quarter: Use DATEADD logic to get previous quarter
mappings.note: Fiscal year runs April to March. FY-2025 = April 2024 to March 2025.

segment.description: Business segment filter on loan_master and disbursements.

business_rules.npa_classification: A loan is classified as NPA when interest or principal instalment is overdue for more than 90 days. In the system, loan_status IN ('NPA', 'NPA_SUBSTANDARD', 'NPA_DOUBTFUL', 'NPA_LOSS') represents all NPA categories.
business_rules.fiscal_year: Financial year runs from April 1 to March 31. FY-2025 means April 1, 2024 to March 31, 2025.
business_rules.active_loans: For portfolio metrics, always filter loan_status = 'ACTIVE' unless the question is about NPA, closed, or written-off loans.
business_rules.collection_period: For collection efficiency, filter on due_date for the period — not payment_date — as we measure what was due vs what was paid.
business_rules.dpd_definition: DPD (Days Past Due) is the number of days since the oldest unpaid EMI was due. DPD > 90 triggers NPA classification per RBI guidelines.
business_rules.par_definition: PAR (Portfolio at Risk) is measured as outstanding principal of stressed loans / total outstanding. PAR30 = DPD > 30, PAR90 = DPD > 90.
business_rules.written_off_exclusion: Written-off accounts are excluded from NPA rate calculations for regulatory NPA reporting, but included in gross NPA calculations.
business_rules.currency: All monetary amounts are in Indian Rupees (INR). Never infer USD or any other currency.

common_joins.loan_master_to_emi: JOIN emi_collections ec ON lm.loan_id = ec.loan_id
common_joins.loan_master_to_disbursements: JOIN disbursements d ON lm.loan_id = d.loan_id
common_joins.loan_master_to_customers: JOIN customers c ON lm.customer_id = c.customer_id
common_joins.loan_master_to_branches: JOIN branches b ON lm.branch_id = b.branch_id

sample_nl_to_sql.question: What is the NPA rate for the SME segment in Q3 2024?
sample_nl_to_sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN loan_status IN ('NPA','NPA_SUBSTANDARD','NPA_DOUBTFUL','NPA_LOSS') THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS npa_rate FROM loan_master WHERE segment = 'SME'

sample_nl_to_sql.question: Show me total disbursements by region for FY2025
sample_nl_to_sql.sql: SELECT region, SUM(disbursement_amount) AS total_disbursement FROM disbursements WHERE fiscal_year = 'FY-2025' GROUP BY region ORDER BY total_disbursement DESC

sample_nl_to_sql.question: What was the collection efficiency last quarter?
sample_nl_to_sql.sql: SELECT SUM(amount_paid) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(emi_amount), 0) AS collection_efficiency FROM emi_collections WHERE quarter = '2024-Q3'

sample_nl_to_sql.question: Which product has the highest NPA amount?
sample_nl_to_sql.sql: SELECT product_type, SUM(CASE WHEN loan_status IN ('NPA','NPA_SUBSTANDARD','NPA_DOUBTFUL','NPA_LOSS') THEN outstanding_principal ELSE 0 END) AS npa_amount FROM loan_master GROUP BY product_type ORDER BY npa_amount DESC LIMIT 1

sample_nl_to_sql.question: What is the PAR30 for the south region?
sample_nl_to_sql.sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN dpd > 30 THEN outstanding_principal ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(outstanding_principal), 0) AS par30 FROM loan_master WHERE region = 'SOUTH'

sample_nl_to_sql.question: How many home loans were disbursed this year?
sample_nl_to_sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT loan_id) AS loan_count, SUM(disbursement_amount) AS total_amount FROM disbursements WHERE product_type = 'HOME_LOAN' AND fiscal_year = 'FY-2025'
